name: Remove Hardcoded Data & Implement Firestore Integration
description: Replace all mock/hardcoded data with real Firestore queries. Create proper data architecture and implement CRUD operations for jobs, applications, and user profiles.
objectives: Design and implement complete Firestore database schema
Replace all hardcoded job data with Firestore collections
Replace hardcoded applicant data with real applications
Implement proper data fetching hooks and services

actions.content:
# Firestore Database Schema

## Collections:

### users/{userId}
```
{
  uid: string
  email: string
  role: 'teen' | 'employer' | 'admin'
  createdAt: timestamp
  // Teen-specific fields
  name?: string
  age?: number
  location?: string
  coordinates?: { lat: number, lng: number }
  profileImageUrl?: string
  bio?: string
  skills?: string[]
  preferredJobTypes?: string[]
  workHistory?: Array<{id, title, company, duration}>
  reviews?: Array<{id, reviewer, rating, comment}>
  // Employer-specific fields
  companyName?: string
  companyLogoUrl?: string
  companyAddress?: string
  companyDescription?: string
  fullName?: string
  idNumber?: string
  phone?: string
}
```

### jobs/{jobId}
```
{
  id: string
  employerId: string (ref to users)
  title: string
  company: string
  location: string
  coordinates: { lat: number, lng: number }
  salary: number
  type: JobType
  description: string
  skills?: string[]
  experience?: string
  days?: string[]
  startTime?: string
  endTime?: string
  status: 'active' | 'closed' | 'draft'
  createdAt: timestamp
  updatedAt: timestamp
  applicationsCount: number
}
```

### applications/{applicationId}
```
{
  id: string
  jobId: string (ref to jobs)
  teenId: string (ref to users)
  employerId: string (ref to users)
  status: 'new' | 'viewed' | 'contacted' | 'rejected' | 'accepted'
  message?: string
  appliedAt: timestamp
  updatedAt: timestamp
}
```

### reviews/{reviewId}
```
{
  id: string
  reviewerId: string (ref to users)
  revieweeId: string (ref to users)
  jobId?: string (ref to jobs)
  rating: number (1-5)
  comment: string
  createdAt: timestamp
}
```

## Indexes Required:
- jobs: (status, createdAt)
- jobs: (employerId, status)
- applications: (jobId, status)
- applications: (teenId, status)
- applications: (employerId, status)

actions.implementation: Export functions: getAllJobs(), getJobById(), createJob(), updateJob(), deleteJob(), getJobsByEmployer(), searchJobs()
Export functions: createApplication(), getApplicationsByJob(), getApplicationsByTeen(), updateApplicationStatus()
